# eCommerce Operator OS — full index

- Agency Client Health Score: Which client needs intervention before the next meeting? (playbooks/agency/agency-client-health-score.md)
- New-Client Onboarding Audit: What is the state of this new client's account, and what do we fix in week one? (playbooks/agency/agency-new-client-audit.md)
- Portfolio Efficiency Watch: Which clients' blended efficiency is sliding toward breakeven? (playbooks/agency/agency-portfolio-mer-watch.md)
- Client QBR Builder: What goes in this client's quarterly business review? (playbooks/agency/agency-qbr-builder.md)
- Retention Intelligence Packet: What should the agency tell this client about retention risk and next actions? (playbooks/agency/agency-retention-intelligence-packet.md)
- Roster Anomaly Radar: Which client needs a human this morning? (playbooks/agency/agency-roster-anomaly-watch.md)
- Roster Wasted-Spend Rollup: Which clients across my roster are wasting the most ad spend this week? (playbooks/agency/agency-roster-wasted-spend.md)
- Retainer Scope-Creep Watch: Which clients are consuming more work than their retainer covers? (playbooks/agency/agency-scope-creep-watch.md)
- Client Tracking Setup Audit: Can we trust this client's tracking before we report on it or scale spend? (playbooks/agency/agency-tracking-setup-audit.md)
- Client Upsell Radar: Which clients have a data-backed reason to expand budget or services right now? (playbooks/agency/agency-upsell-radar.md)
- Commerce Product Visibility Audit: Which products are invisible across commerce, search, and feed surfaces? (playbooks/ecommerce/commerce-product-visibility-audit.md)
- Ad-to-Landing-Page Message Match Audit: Where does ad promise fail to match landing-page reality? (playbooks/ecommerce/ecom-ad-message-match.md)
- Checkout Health Watch: Is checkout conversion healthy enough to trust demand generation? (playbooks/ecommerce/ecom-checkout-health.md)
- Funnel Leak Finder: Where is the buying journey leaking revenue? (playbooks/ecommerce/ecom-funnel-leak-finder.md)
- PDP Improvement List: Which product pages should be improved first? (playbooks/ecommerce/ecom-pdp-improvement-list.md)
- Promo Effectiveness: Did the promotion improve customer quality, margin, or conversion? (playbooks/ecommerce/ecom-promo-effectiveness.md)
- Stockout Lost-Revenue Impact: Which stockouts are costing the most demand or revenue? (playbooks/ecommerce/ecom-stockout-impact.md)
- Tracking Sanity Check: Can we trust the tracking before making growth decisions? (playbooks/ecommerce/ecom-tracking-sanity.md)
- Weekly Trading Deck: What happened this week, why, and what should the operator do next? (playbooks/ecommerce/ecom-weekly-trading-deck.md)
- Contribution Profit by Channel: Which channels are creating contribution profit, not just revenue? (playbooks/founder/commerce-contribution-profit-by-channel.md)
- Profit Readiness Audit: Do we have enough cost evidence to answer profit questions safely? (playbooks/founder/commerce-profit-readiness-audit.md)
- Revenue Anomaly Watch: What changed enough to explain the revenue anomaly? (playbooks/founder/founder-anomaly-watch.md)
- Cash and Payout Snapshot: What does cash, payout, refund, and sales evidence say about runway pressure? (playbooks/founder/founder-cash-runway-snapshot.md)
- Pace to Target: Are we on pace to hit the target, and what must change today? (playbooks/founder/founder-pace-to-target.md)
- Promo Post-Mortem: Did the promotion create incremental value or just pull forward demand? (playbooks/founder/founder-promo-postmortem.md)
- Promo Profit Doctor: Which promotions look good on revenue but weak on profit? (playbooks/founder/founder-promo-profit-doctor.md)
- Year-over-Year Pulse: What is materially different versus the same period last year? (playbooks/founder/founder-yoy-pulse.md)
- Attribution Reconciliation: Which source of attribution is drifting from commerce truth? (playbooks/marketing/marketing-attribution-reconciliation.md)
- Blended MER Watch: Is blended efficiency moving in the right direction? (playbooks/marketing/marketing-blended-mer-watch.md)
- Brand Cannibalisation Audit: Are paid campaigns buying demand that organic search would have captured? (playbooks/marketing/marketing-brand-cannibalisation.md)
- New-Customer CAC by Channel: Which channels are acquiring new customers at acceptable cost? (playbooks/marketing/marketing-cac-by-channel.md)
- Competitor Demand Brief: Which competitor demand signals deserve a response? (playbooks/marketing/marketing-competitor-demand-brief.md)
- Marginal Budget Allocator: Where should the next marginal dollar go? (playbooks/marketing/marketing-marginal-budget-allocator.md)
- Dead Stock Watch: Which products are tying up cash without enough demand? (playbooks/merchandising/merch-dead-stock-watch.md)
- GMC Feed Audit: Which feed issues are blocking product visibility or trust? (playbooks/merchandising/merch-gmc-feed-audit.md)
- Least Profitable Products: Which products create the weakest known profit? (playbooks/merchandising/merch-least-profitable-products.md)
- Product Data Quality: Which product data gaps are hurting sales, feed quality, or search? (playbooks/merchandising/merch-product-data-quality.md)
- Stockout Priority List: Which stockouts create the most commercial risk? (playbooks/merchandising/merch-stockout-priority.md)
- Ops Daily Standup: What order, fulfilment, refund, or exception queue needs action today? (playbooks/operations/ops-daily-standup.md)
- Stripe Dispute Evidence Pack: What evidence is needed to respond to this dispute safely? (playbooks/operations/ops-dispute-evidence.md)
- CPA Spike Root Cause Explainer: Why did CPA spike and what should be checked first? (playbooks/performance/perf-cpa-root-cause.md)
- Creative Fatigue List: Which ads are fatigued enough to refresh before they drain spend? (playbooks/performance/perf-creative-fatigue-list.md)
- Google Ads Search-Term Audit: Which search terms are wasting spend or cannibalising intent? (playbooks/performance/perf-google-search-term-audit.md)
- Performance Morning Dashboard: What needs attention in paid media this morning? (playbooks/performance/perf-morning-dashboard.md)
- Performance Max Deep Dive: Is Performance Max scaling profitably or hiding waste? (playbooks/performance/perf-pmax-deep-dive.md)
- Shopping Feed Watch: Which shopping feed issues are hurting paid performance? (playbooks/performance/perf-shopping-feed-watch.md)
- Wasted Spend Killer: Which spend should be killed, refreshed, watched, or kept? (playbooks/performance/perf-wasted-spend-killer.md)
- Abandoned Cart Recovery Doctor: Is abandoned-cart recovery leaving money behind? (playbooks/retention/email-abandoned-cart-recovery-doctor.md)
- Email Deliverability Watch: Is deliverability safe enough to keep sending? (playbooks/retention/email-deliverability-watch.md)
- Klaviyo Flow Health Check: Which lifecycle flows are underperforming or broken? (playbooks/retention/email-flow-health-check.md)
- Email Monday Recap: What changed in email and retention last week? (playbooks/retention/email-monday-recap.md)
- Replenishment Timing: When should replenishment messages be sent by product or category? (playbooks/retention/email-replenishment-timing.md)
- VIP Cohort Watch: Are VIP customers becoming less active or less valuable? (playbooks/retention/email-vip-watch.md)
- Winback Builder: Which dormant customers are worth trying to win back? (playbooks/retention/email-winback-builder.md)
- SEO Cannibalisation Audit: Which pages compete with each other for the same search demand? (playbooks/seo/seo-cannibalisation-audit.md)
- SEO Content Decay Watch: Which pages are losing demand and are worth refreshing? (playbooks/seo/seo-content-decay.md)
- SEO Quick Wins: Which organic search wins are close enough to act on now? (playbooks/seo/seo-quick-wins.md)
- Schema and Rich Result Readiness: Which structured-data gaps block ecommerce search trust? (playbooks/seo/seo-schema-rich-result-readiness.md)
